title: ai_extract is now generally available ​
body:
**June 11, 2026**

The `ai_extract` function is now generally available. This function extracts structured data from text and documents according to a schema you provide, supporting nested objects, arrays, type validation, citations, and confidence scores. See [`ai_extract` function](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/functions/ai_extract).

For a no-code UI to build, validate, and iterate on extraction agents, see [Information Extraction](/aws/en/agents/agent-bricks/info-extraction).
